name: Cherried Sweet Potato Scallop
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 lb Sweet Potatoes (Plain Canned - Or Fresh)
recipeInstructions:
1. If using raw sweet potatoes, pare and cut into slices 1/2 to 3/4 inch thick. Place in a saucepan and add 1 cup of water, then cook until tender. Drain if using canned sweet potatoes.
2. Grease a 9 X 13 X 2-inch baking pan with butter.
3. Add the sweet potatoes and cherries to the prepared pan.
4. In a saucepan, combine the remaining ingredients except the marshmallows. Cook until you have a thin syrup.
5. Pour the syrup over the sweet potatoes and cherries in the baking pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F for 30 minutes or until the syrup is thick.
7. Just before serving, top with marshmallows and return to the oven to brown.
Yield: 8 to 10 servings
